title: paspalum schaffneri
intro: Paspalum schaffneri, also known as Bahama grass, is a type of tropical grass that is native to the Caribbean and parts of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum schaffneri include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of diarrhea and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Paspalum schaffneri are often made into teas or infusions, and may be used topically to treat skin conditions and injuries.
